readiness_levels.production-candidate: Real user/device validation exists on at least one platform and FinClaw may expose it as a guarded user-facing collector.
readiness_levels.deep-beta: Substantial collector design and tests exist, but broader real-device validation is still required.
readiness_levels.baseline+audit: Runnable local/export/package path exists with tests, manifest coverage, provenance, and evidence policy, but real account validation is not complete.
readiness_levels.baseline: Runnable baseline exists with tests, but audit coverage or real validation is incomplete.
readiness_levels.migrated-review: Migrated skill exists and must pass provenance, license, and investor-specific boundary review before broad exposure.

entries.collects: EastMoney assets, positions, executions, orders, fund flows, watchlists, notes, recent views, and local investment behavior evidence.
entries.must_not_collect: Passwords, cookies, tokens, device fingerprints, order placement, order cancellation, or raw network payloads.
entries.production_gap: Broader Windows/Linux real-device validation.

entries.collects: Tonghuashun local executions, inferred holdings, personal metadata, and read-only visible trading-page snapshots.
entries.must_not_collect: Trading passwords, order placement, order cancellation, or broker-side mutation.
entries.production_gap: More real-device validation across Windows/macOS accounts and stronger GUI snapshot coverage.

entries.collects: Authorized WeChat messages, contacts, groups, compact owner-relevant chat evidence, CollectorX event package, field coverage, filter policy, source audit, and generic-to-lens evidence boundary.
entries.must_not_collect: Secrets, decrypted keys in output, unrelated raw payload dumps, or automatic investment conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Prepare authorized WeChat 4.x keys or supported platform path, then validate real lake output and contact/group allowlists.

entries.collects: Investment reasons, consultation objects, sentiment, bias clues, decision context, classification metadata, source policy audit, and explicit source-policy gap states from already-collected WeChat events.
entries.must_not_collect: Fresh WeChat database access or non-investment chats.
entries.production_gap: Real WeChat lake validation, user-tuned contact/group/sender allowlists, and trade-adjacent backtests.

entries.collects: Authorized local file metadata: path, extension, size, modified time, source audit, extension coverage, skipped reason counts, and per-root scan results.
entries.must_not_collect: File bodies by default, whole-disk scans, credentials, or investment conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Real Windows/Linux device validation and broader private file-sample review.

entries.collects: Research reports, financial statements, valuation models, announcement notes, explicit DOCX/PDF/XLSX/XLSM content extraction, path-level source audit, skipped reasons, and screenshot metadata-only evidence.
entries.must_not_collect: Public report database crawls, unrelated private files, screenshot OCR without separate user authorization and adapter, or generic file bodies without explicit authorization.
entries.production_gap: More real PDF/XLSX/DOCX samples, optional screenshot OCR adapter decision, and Wiki backtest against trades/reviews.

entries.collects: Authorized IMAP or local email metadata, body previews, sender/recipient fields, message IDs, attachment refs, account/folder audit, local import path-level audit, skipped file reasons, ZIP member audit, field coverage, and archive provenance.
entries.must_not_collect: Full body unless explicitly authorized, attachment bodies by default, tokens, cookies, or passwords.
entries.production_gap: Register real mailbox credentials via password_env, validate broker/IR sender matching, and run no-full-body leakage review.

entries.collects: Broker research, morning notes, roadshow invitations, IR communications, and research attachment signals.
entries.must_not_collect: Generic personal mail as investor evidence.
entries.production_gap: Real mailbox validation and false-positive backtest.

entries.collects: Xueqiu watchlists, symbols, groups, industries, tags, notes, followed time, archive provenance, source audit, and field coverage.
entries.must_not_collect: Broker-confirmed holdings, executions, orders, or fund flows.
entries.production_gap: Real Xueqiu account export discovery and real watchlist pagination validation.

entries.collects: Xueqiu follows, posts, comments, favorites, saved pages, owner portfolios, rebalance records, source audit, pagination marker audit, and field coverage.
entries.must_not_collect: Trading facts unless corroborated by broker sources, login secrets, or platform-wide public scraping.
entries.production_gap: Real account adapter/export workflow, real pagination coverage, and rate/terms boundary review.

entries.collects: Alipay, Tiantian Fund, Danjuan, Qieman, and bank-wealth holdings, transactions, asset snapshots, value fields, PnL, fees, platform coverage, source audit, and asset value summary.
entries.must_not_collect: Payment passwords, bank credentials, complete asset-boundary claims from partial input, or account mutation.
entries.production_gap: Per-platform real export or read-only screen adapters and complete account-boundary proof.

entries.collects: Meeting minutes, transcripts, subtitles, participants, organizer, meeting URLs, time fields, text previews, platform coverage, source audit, ZIP skip reasons, and path-level parse results.
entries.must_not_collect: Meeting platform credentials, unrelated meetings as investor evidence, or attachment bodies by default.
entries.production_gap: Real Feishu/DingTalk/WeCom/Tencent Meeting account adapters and participant normalization.

entries.collects: DingTalk messages, chats, contacts, file refs, meeting refs, participants, content previews, source audit, ZIP skip reasons, and path-level parse results.
entries.must_not_collect: Credential material, file bodies by default, or direct investor conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Real DingTalk export/API validation and investment-collaboration lens backtest.

entries.collects: WeCom messages, chats, contacts, file refs, meeting refs, participants, content previews, source audit, ZIP skip reasons, and path-level parse results.
entries.must_not_collect: Credential material, file bodies by default, or direct investor conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Real WeCom export/API validation and investment-collaboration lens backtest.

entries.collects: Feishu messages, chats, contacts, documents, file refs, folders, meeting refs, recording refs, source audit, ZIP skip reasons, and path-level parse results.
entries.must_not_collect: Tenant secrets, app secrets, cookies, access/refresh tokens, unauthorized workspace-wide data, file bodies by default, or direct investor conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Real Feishu account API/export validation, tenant permission boundary review, participant normalization, and investor lens backtest.

entries.collects: Roadshows, research meetings, investment committee records, review meetings, and meeting-derived decision context.
entries.must_not_collect: Unrelated operational meetings as investor facts.
entries.production_gap: Real platform artifacts, participant identity normalization, and false-positive review.

entries.collects: Obsidian, Notion, Youdao, Evernote/Yinxiang, Markdown, HTML, JSON, ENEX, and ZIP note previews with tags, paths, URLs, platform coverage, per-input source audit, skipped reasons, ZIP member audit, and content policy.
entries.must_not_collect: Note service tokens, direct investor conclusions, or full content unless explicitly authorized.
entries.production_gap: Real Notion/Youdao/Evernote account validation and Windows/Linux vault path validation.

entries.collects: Investment notes, review records, rules, checklists, thesis updates, and decision frameworks.
entries.must_not_collect: Non-investment notes as investor facts.
entries.production_gap: User allowlists and real note-corpus false-positive backtest.

entries.collects: TickTick/Dida task titles, projects, status, start/due/completion times, recurrence, reminders, source audit, ZIP skip reasons, and path-level parse results.
entries.must_not_collect: OAuth tokens in output or direct investment conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Real OAuth validation and recurring task/timezone backtest.

entries.collects: Calendar events, start/end time, all-day flag, location, meeting links, organizer, attendees, recurrence, reminders, platform coverage, source audit, ZIP skip reasons, and path-level parse results.
entries.must_not_collect: Calendar account credentials or direct investment conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Real Apple/Google/Outlook/Feishu/DingTalk/WeCom/Tencent Meeting calendar validation.

entries.collects: Trading plans, research tasks, review reminders, earnings/event follow-ups, and execution discipline signals.
entries.must_not_collect: Unrelated personal tasks as investor facts.
entries.production_gap: Real task/calendar backtest and threshold tuning.

entries.collects: WeChat favorite/read/share/saved-file actions, article titles, source accounts, URLs, tags, text previews, action coverage, per-input source audit, skipped reasons, ZIP member audit, and content policy.
entries.must_not_collect: WeChat secrets, unrelated article bodies as conclusions, or platform-wide public account scraping.
entries.production_gap: Real WeChat favorites/public-account stores and Windows/Linux path validation.

entries.collects: Investment public-account articles, saved investment reading sources, and article-based influence evidence.
entries.must_not_collect: General reading history as investor conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Real article-store validation and account/tag allowlists.

entries.collects: WallstreetCN, CLS, and Gelonghui read, favorite, subscribe, search, alert, browser-history, URL, domain, symbol, source-app traces, platform/action coverage, per-input source audit, skipped reasons, and ZIP member audit.
entries.must_not_collect: Public news crawling, public article mirroring, or unrelated browser history.
entries.production_gap: Real app/account adapters, subscription stores, and Safari/Windows/Linux history validation.

entries.collects: Futu, Tiger, and IBKR assets, positions, executions, orders, cashflows, dividends, FX, margin, tax, settlement, multi-currency amount fields, broker/trade-surface coverage, per-input source audit, skipped reasons, and ZIP member audit.
entries.must_not_collect: Trading passwords, order mutation, community discussions, or complete brokerage-boundary claims without real validation.
entries.production_gap: Real Futu/Tiger/IBKR exports or read-only screens and broker-specific column maps.

entries.collects: Wind, Choice, iFinD, and Bloomberg workspaces, watchlists, searches, downloads, exports, templates, factors, datasets, fields, function codes, workflow metadata, terminal/activity coverage, per-input source audit, skipped reasons, and ZIP member audit.
entries.must_not_collect: Vendor databases, licensed content bodies, public market data mirrors, terminal credentials, or license material.
entries.production_gap: Real licensed terminal export validation and license-safe account-level review.

entries.collects: Weibo, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu follows, likes, favorites, watch history, comments, shares, creators, topics, symbols, engagement counts, weak influence signals, platform/action/field coverage, per-input source audit, skipped file reasons, and ZIP member audit.
entries.must_not_collect: Standalone investment conclusions, platform-wide scraping, full creator-profile scraping, or private platform secrets.
entries.production_gap: Real platform exports, creator/domain allowlists, and weak-evidence backtest.

entries.collects: Investment creator influence, attention sources, and corroboration candidates from social activity.
entries.must_not_collect: Standalone investment advice or conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Weak-evidence backtest against stronger trade/research sources.

entries.collects: Authorized QQ contacts, groups, messages, and compact communication evidence.
entries.must_not_collect: Passphrases in output, decrypted keys, unrelated raw dumps, or investment conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Current macOS passphrase capture limitation and investor lens routing.
